decoder_heading: Anti-Piracy Measures
ident_heading: Anti-Piracy Measures
heading_content_part: Anti-Piracy Measures

decoder_heading: The first time the user launches Network Browser, anonymous data is transmitted to the Ape Apps server to verify the integrity of the install
ident_heading: The first time the user launches Network Browser, anonymous data is transmitted to the Ape Apps server to verify the integrity of the install
heading_content_part: The first time the user launches Network Browser, anonymous data is transmitted to the Ape Apps server to verify the integrity of the install, in an effort to combat software piracy.

decoder_heading: Non-Online Features
ident_heading: Non-Online Features
heading_content_part: Non-Online Features

decoder_heading: In addition to the online features mentioned above, Network Browser includes some offline capabilities in which you may want to be aware of
ident_heading: In addition to the online features mentioned above, Network Browser includes some offline capabilities in which you may want to be aware of
heading_content_part: In addition to the online features mentioned above, Network Browser includes some offline capabilities in which you may want to be aware of.

decoder_heading: Specifically, Network Browser has the ability to detect specific state changes with your device
ident_heading: Specifically, Network Browser has the ability to detect specific state changes with your device
heading_content_part: Specifically, Network Browser has the ability to detect specific state changes with your device, such as when the device is rotated, or when the device has an incoming phone call or notification.  These abilities are only there in order to improve app usability.  For instance, Network Browser can detect movements in your device in order to facilitate the handling of shake related gestures.  In addition, Network Browser can detect when a phone call is received in order to disable in-app sound effects during a phone call.  In any event, no information relative to your device or your phone calls or contacts is ever collected or stored by Ape Apps.
